name: window-title
author: lumine-code
description: Choose a preset or customize the window title with a Liquid template.

template.title: Window Title
template.description: Select the information shown in the window title. Choose `Custom` to use the template below.

custom.title: Custom Template
custom.description: Liquid template used when `Window Title` is `Custom`. Variables: `projectTitle`, `projectPaths`, `projectCount`, `projectName`, `projectPath`, `fileName`, `filePath`, `relativeFilePath`, `gitHead`, `appName`, `devMode`, `safeMode`. Supports tags such as `{% if devMode %} [Dev]{% endif %}`. If the template renders empty, the title falls back to `Lumine`.
custom.default: {% if projectTitle %}{{ projectTitle }}{% else %}{{ fileName }} — {{ projectPaths }}{% endif %}
